phase1_errors: External DB connection from local machine fails (Render free-tier restriction) — migration runs on Render startup instead
phase4_errors: No Resend API key configured — email service logs to console. Add RESEND_API_KEY env var for real emails
phase6_errors: Stripe not configured — payment features are stubbed. Add STRIPE_SECRET_KEY env var for real payments
Stripe npm package not installed (add manually: npm install stripe)
phase10_errors: ENCRYPTION_KEY not set — using random key per restart (data encrypted with old key won't decrypt). Set ENCRYPTION_KEY env var for persistent encryption
